task_completion.description: Verify that a folder named 'Modern Architecture Tour' has been created in the application's sidebar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a folder icon labeled 'Modern Architecture Tour' under the 'My Places' or 'Temporary Places' section in the left sidebar of the Google Earth interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that placemarks for the three required landmarks (Sydney Opera House, Burj Khalifa, Guggenheim Bilbao) have been added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for placemark items (often pushpin icons) labeled 'Sydney Opera House', 'Burj Khalifa', and 'Guggenheim Bilbao' (or 'Guggenheim Museum Bilbao') listed in the sidebar, ideally nested within the 'Modern Architecture Tour' folder.

task_completion.description: Verify that a tour object has been created or the recording interface is active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tour icon (usually a video camera symbol) appearing in the sidebar within the 'Modern Architecture Tour' folder, or look for the tour recording control bar (containing a record button and timeline) visible at the bottom of the map view.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent attempts to save the file with the correct name and path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save Place As' or 'Save File' dialog box showing the filename 'architecture_tour.kmz' and the destination folder '/home/ga/Documents'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the final KMZ file exists in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager window (e.g., Nautilus/Files) showing a file named 'architecture_tour.kmz' inside the 'Documents' directory.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Google Earth GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Google Earth application window with the 3D globe and sidebar, rather than just terminal windows or text editors.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not manually construct the KMZ file using terminal commands or text editors.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no screenshots of the agent writing XML/KML code in a text editor or using 'zip' commands in the terminal to create the output file.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually visited the locations visually.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the main map view displaying the specific landmarks (Sydney Opera House, Burj Khalifa, Guggenheim Bilbao) at some point during the trajectory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Required Folder Name: 'Modern Architecture Tour'. Required Placemarks: 'Sydney Opera House', 'Burj Khalifa', 'Guggenheim Bilbao'. Output File: '/home/ga/Documents/architecture_tour.kmz'. The application used is likely Google Earth Pro.
